provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly scene concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, atmospheric directional lighting, worn and functional lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and cultural detail, visible brushstrokes, Mire colonial organism working in a cargo bay — vaguely humanoid shape assembled from hundreds of thumb-sized pale green-grey translucent slug-cells, two darker sensory patches where eyes would be, multiple pseudopod-arms reaching in different directions handling heavy cargo containers, edges dissolving slightly as stray cells detach and reattach, moist surface gleaming under industrial lights, the galaxy's expendable labor
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine, heroic pose, action scene, combat, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, cute, chibi

judgment.explanation: Strong hit — concept reads clearly, style consistent, gritty lived-in aesthetic.
